title: Extracting Relevant Information from JSON
scenario: A company has a JSON object containing information about its employees, including name, department, job title, and contact information. The goal is to extract the names of all employees in the marketing department and their corresponding job titles, and present the extracted information in a formatted JSON object
constraints: Must only extract information from the specified department
Must use only dot notation to access nested fields

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the code adheres to the constraints of field access and department filtering
Check if the code is syntactically correct
Check if the extracted information is accurate and matches the expected results
